title: Settings
subtitle: Configure application paths and preferences
label.baseDirTooltip: Root directory for Star Citizen Wine prefix and runners
label.logLevelTooltip: Controls verbosity of application log output
label.githubTokenTooltip: Star Control downloads Wine runners and DXVK from GitHub. Without a token, GitHub allows 60 requests/hour per IP. This is enough for normal use - you only need a token if you hit rate limits, e.g. during development or when many users share one IP.
label.githubTokenHint: Optional. Only needed if you exceed GitHub's 60 requests/hour limit.
reset.description: This will permanently delete the entire Star Citizen installation, including the Wine prefix, runners, and all game files. The app configuration and cache will be removed. Star Control will restart and return to the initial setup.
reset.confirmMsg: Are you sure? This will delete the entire installation, Wine prefix, and game files. This cannot be undone.
